dunwell
Apps Contact

Small tools, built well, one at a time.

Dunwell is where apps get made — each one shipped end to end, kept small on purpose.

Métropole

A trip planner built for one festival week in Montreal — shared itineraries, curated places, and a live plan everyone in the group could see.

Type Travel PWA
Status Active
Built June 2026

Hyoshi

A personal task board and day planner — frosted-glass cards you drag between lists, plus a schedule view, installable straight to the iPhone home screen.

Type Productivity PWA
Status Active
Built June 2026
